name: claude-legal-federal-laws
description: Shared reference corpus for federal U.S. debt-collection and consumer-finance law (FDCPA, FCRA, TILA, ECOA, Reg B/F/V/Z) plus the model Uniform Commercial Code (Articles 1, 2, 3, 9 — ALI/ULC model text). Data-only plugin: no skills, no slash commands. Other plugins in the claude-legal marketplace declare this as a dependency and symlink into its `references/` tree so federal/UCC content lives in one place instead of being duplicated per state. The marketplace runtime auto-installs this plugin whenever a dependent state plugin is installed and dereferences the symlinks at install time, so each installed state plugin still gets the federal content locally.
